'''zhahuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drabber|drabber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drabber|drabber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhahuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæhithith|zhæhithith]] || [[word:zhæhithij|zhæhithij]] || [[word:zhæhithish|zhæhithish]] || [[word:zhæhithi|zhæhithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahuhuthuth|zhahuhuthuth]] || [[word:zhahuhuthuj|zhahuhuthuj]] || [[word:zhahuhuthush|zhahuhuthush]] || [[word:zhahuhuthu|zhahuhuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahuthuth|zhahuthuth]] || [[word:zhahuthuj|zhahuthuj]] || [[word:zhahuthush|zhahuthush]] || [[word:zhahuthu|zhahuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahufthuth|zhahufthuth]] || [[word:zhahufthuj|zhahufthuj]] || [[word:zhahufthush|zhahufthush]] || [[word:zhahufthuf|zhahufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhahuthuthu|zhahuthuthu]] || [[word:zhahuthuju|zhahuthuju]] || [[word:zhahuthushu|zhahuthushu]] || [[word:zhahuthuku|zhahuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhahuthuth|zhahuthuth]] || [[word:zhahuthuj|zhahuthuj]] || [[word:zhahuthush|zhahuthush]] || [[word:zhahuthu|zhahuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhahuthuthul|zhahuthuthul]] || [[word:zhahuthujul|zhahuthujul]] || [[word:zhahuthushul|zhahuthushul]] || [[word:zhahuthukul|zhahuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhahuthuthuthu|zhahuthuthuthu]] || [[word:zhahuthujuju|zhahuthujuju]] || [[word:zhahuthushushu|zhahuthushushu]] || [[word:zhahuthuku|zhahuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhahuthuthun|zhahuthuthun]] || [[word:zhahuthujun|zhahuthujun]] || [[word:zhahuthushun|zhahuthushun]] || [[word:zhahuthukun|zhahuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhahuthuthuoro|zhahuthuthuoro]] || [[word:zhahuthujuoro|zhahuthujuoro]] || [[word:zhahuthushuoro|zhahuthushuoro]] || [[word:zhahuthukuoro|zhahuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
